suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove or update the stale 'Known Pre-Existing Issues' entry for `misc-peers-panel-nested-button` now that commit b478499 fixed the nested-button defect.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify ui-screen-worker skip guidance so non-visual accessibility/DOM-structure fixes with strong automated coverage can be treated as acceptable manual-validation skip cases.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report `.factory/validation/misc-accessibility/scrutiny/reviews/misc-peers-panel-nested-button.json` flags a procedure mismatch where the fix was structurally accessibility-focused and fully test-covered but still required a deviation entry.
